name: MapR5SupplydeliverySupplyitemtypeForR4SupplydeliveryType
title: Cross-version ConceptMap for ValueSet R5-supplydelivery-supplyitemtype-for-R4-supplydelivery-type from FHIR R5 to FHIR R4
description: This ConceptMap represents the cross-version mapping of concepts from ValueSet `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-supplyitemtype|5.0.0` for use in FHIR R4.

target.comment:
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-supplyitemtype|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-SupplydeliverySupplyitemtype-R4B-SupplydeliveryType` (`ConceptMap-R5-SupplydeliverySupplyitemtype-R4B-SupplydeliveryType.json`)
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.3.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.0.1` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/4.3/ConceptMap/R4B-SupplydeliveryType-R4-SupplydeliveryType` (`ConceptMap-R4B-SupplydeliveryType-R4-SupplydeliveryType.json`)
Applying explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-supplyitemtype|5.0.0#device` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.0.1#device` as Equivalent in `ConceptMap-R5-SupplydeliverySupplyitemtype-R4-SupplydeliveryType.json`, which results in Equivalent.

Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-supplyitemtype|5.0.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.3.0` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/5.0/ConceptMap/R5-SupplydeliverySupplyitemtype-R4B-SupplydeliveryType` (`ConceptMap-R5-SupplydeliverySupplyitemtype-R4B-SupplydeliveryType.json`)
Using explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.3.0` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.0.1` as Equivalent in `http://hl7.org/fhir/uv/xver/4.3/ConceptMap/R4B-SupplydeliveryType-R4-SupplydeliveryType` (`ConceptMap-R4B-SupplydeliveryType-R4-SupplydeliveryType.json`)
Applying explicit mapping from `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-supplyitemtype|5.0.0#medication` to `http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/supplydelivery-type|4.0.1#medication` as Equivalent in `ConceptMap-R5-SupplydeliverySupplyitemtype-R4-SupplydeliveryType.json`, which results in Equivalent.
